description: CompositionPale orchid polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, vented hem, softly ribbed collar and cuffs, short buttoned placket, embroidered brand badge on the left chestFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Do not dry clean This pale orchid polo neck tee from s.oliver oozes tranquillity and a laid-back attitude. Feel relaxed and cool in this pure cotton t-shirt from s.oliver, as you chill out with your friends at the restaurant. Team it with jeans or cargos, and look perfectly calm.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
